content:
This page helps you connect a **Raspberry Pi Pico W** with a **Pimoroni Galactic Unicorn** (53×11 LED matrix) to your DREM deployment.

**Connection Details** shows your AppSync endpoint, region, and API key — copy these or use the config generator.

**Generate config.json** creates a ready-to-use configuration file. Select your event and track, enter your WiFi network name and password, then click Download. Copy the file to the Pico alongside the display code — no further editing needed.
